description: Fix broken dashboard views, add project-centric navigation, task drill-down, and inbox panel

specs.description: Health ring shows warning when tree-sitter is stub
specs.given: A project where astIsStub=true (no tree-sitter analysis run)
specs.then: A warning banner appears instead of a fake 100/100 score; ring shows gray/unknown state

specs.description: Graph renders primary and secondary adapter nodes with distinct colors
specs.given: A project with adapters/primary/ and adapters/secondary/ directories
specs.then: Primary adapter nodes are colored distinctly from secondary adapter nodes (not gray)

specs.given: Two projects with different agents registered
specs.when: User selects project A in the sidebar
specs.then: Agent Fleet shows only agents where project_id matches project A

specs.description: Swarm task drill-down shows agent and worktree
specs.given: A swarm task assigned to agent X with worktree_path set
specs.when: User clicks on the task in swarm monitor
specs.then: Expanded view shows agent name, host, status, worktree path, and recent commits in that worktree

specs.description: Inbox panel shows unacknowledged notifications for project agents
specs.given: Two unacked notifications (priority 1 and 2) for agents in the current project
specs.then: Both notifications appear; priority 2 is highlighted with red/critical styling; ack button available

specs.description: Root URL redirects to SolidJS dashboard
specs.then: User sees the SolidJS dashboard SPA, not the legacy index.html

specs.description: WorkPlan view links to originating ADR
specs.given: A workplan with adr field set to 'ADR-060'
specs.then: Clickable link to ADR-060 that opens in the ADR browser view
Shows 'SpacetimeDB unavailable' banner with reconnect indicator, not blank/broken views
Returns 400 Bad Request, does not serve the file
